assumptions: The developer has arrived after discovery.
The developer does not yet have a Box Free Developer account or an API access token.

developer_goal: Create a first Box Platform application and make a first authenticated API call without a preselected authentication method or tool.

first_success.outcome: A newly activated Box Free Developer account uses its automatically created and authorized CCG application to obtain an access token and retrieve the authenticated service-account user.
first_success.observable_signal: `GET https://api.box.com/2.0/users/me` returns HTTP 200 and a user JSON object with fields such as `id`, `type`, `name`, and `login`.

route_selection.surface: Box Free Developer Plan default CCG app and Get Current User
route_selection.rule: Select the lexicographically shortest complete official route to the same first-success outcome after fixing product intent; if peer routes remain consequential, mark needs-human-judgment.

candidates.name: Box Free Developer Plan default CCG app and Get Current User
candidates.reason: Recorded as a reconstructable candidate, but public evidence does not close signup-field opacity and/or peer-route lexicographic selection for a verified count.

candidates.name: Platform App with developer token and Get Current User
candidates.reason: The token guide demonstrates `/users/me`, but the first-application guide does not select that endpoint as its terminal test.

candidates.name: Postman List items in folder quickstart
candidates.reason: This has an explicit first-call summary but requires the separate Postman collection and environment setup.

candidates.name: Box CLI
candidates.reason: The first-application guide presents CLI as an alternative test interface.

required_path.action: Complete Box account creation or trial signup at the official entry URL.

required_fields.label: Signup identity and required account fields
required_fields.notes: Public evidence does not establish the complete current required field set behind the client-rendered or authenticated signup surface.

required_path.observable_result: A new Box account or trial session exists.

required_path.action: Complete any required email or identity verification for the new account.
required_path.observable_result: The account becomes usable for developer onboarding.

required_path.action: Complete the documented post-login setup for the selected Box candidate through first success.

required_fields.label: Candidate-specific configuration
required_fields.notes: Exact fields depend on unresolved product, auth, or framework selection.

required_path.observable_result: `GET https://api.box.com/2.0/users/me` returns HTTP 200 and a user JSON object with fields such as `id`, `type`, `name`, and `login`.

prerequisites.description: {'order': 1, 'type': 'account', 'requirement': 'Create a Box Free Developer account with name, email, password, terms acceptance, and Get Started; the account activates immediately.', 'required': True, 'source_ids': ['S6']}

{'order': 2, 'type': 'permission', 'requirement': "Viewing the CCG client secret requires Box two-factor authentication. The access token identifies the default app's service account and must be protected.", 'required': True, 'source_ids': ['S7']}

external_gates.description: A Free Developer account requires name, email, password, terms acceptance, and Get Started, but activates immediately without billing.
CCG requires client ID, protected client secret, enterprise ID, and Box 2FA to reveal the secret.
The token endpoint must return an active access token; server-auth tokens do not include a refresh token and must be requested again after expiry.

unavoidable_waits.description: Email or identity-provider verification delivery when the selected account route requires it.

excluded.item: Additional content endpoints and application features after the authenticated identity call.
excluded.reason: Listed as excluded after success in the source record.

excluded.item: Production OAuth lifecycle, app enablement, App Center publication, webhooks, enterprise rollout, metadata, AI, uploads, and custom portals are excluded.
excluded.reason: Listed as excluded after success in the source record.

uncertainties.question: Does the automatically created free-account CCG app expose its enterprise ID in the same Configuration section as the client credentials for every account?
uncertainties.impact: If the identifier appears elsewhere, the developer must navigate to another app or account settings page before requesting the token.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Resolve against current official docs and a dated fresh-account or cold walkthrough: The Free Developer Plan confirms automatic app creation and authorization, while the CCG guide names the required enterprise ID without documenting the free-account screen layout.

uncertainties.question: What exact current required signup, identity, legal, and entitlement fields does Box show for a new developer, and which peer route is the lexicographic shortest path?
uncertainties.impact: Without those fields and a closed route choice, action and field counts cannot be verified for peer comparison.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: A dated read-only walkthrough of the live signup and the selected post-login first-success path, with screenshots of required fields and confirmation that peer routes are longer or gated.
